title: Moons skinny swords
description: Moons skinny swords is a lovely little overlay that adds simple swords
body:
This overlay adds Skinny swords, smilar to the swords that Dewier and Q bedwars use in their videos. 

This pack effects all default swords and works with all minecraft clients (lunar, badlion, and feather) that dont change the sword textures.

This pack is great for Bedwars and looks very clean in combat!
